title: Enchanting With TFC
description: Enchanting addon for tfc, add new enchantment and more!
body:
Enchanting With TFC is a TFC addon that expand enchanting in tfc.

This mod add a craft for the enchanting table and a few enchantment.

Enchanting With TFC add the following enchantments : 
- piercing protection => Reduces the effect of piercing damage(compatible with other protections).
- slashing protection => Reduces the effect of slashing damage(compatible with other protections).
- crushing protection => Reduces the effect of crushing damage(compatible with other protections).
- slow aspect => Slow the target.
- Hunting => Increases the damage against predators(compatible with sharpness).

To get started, you will need to get vanilla Obsidian, you can mine it with a Wrought Iron pickaxe or above.

The enchanting table need wrought iron sheets, a red wool and a book.

![Enchanting Table Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121-Mods/EnchantingWithTFC/master/EnchantingTableRecipe.png)

Since tfc removed the bookshelf recipe, you need to use the chiseled bookshelf from tfc and add book to it, 6 book = 3 enchanting power, only 6 full chiseled bookshelf are needed to get level 30.

Gem dusts(amethyst, opal, etc...) are used instead of lapis in the enchanting table.

[![Kinecic Hosting banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121/Branding/master/KineticHosting.png) ](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=540)
